input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.8.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.8.4
            TITLE: engine inspection (ic only)

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.8.4: Engine Inspection (IC Only)
IN.8.4 Engine Inspection (IC Only) 
The organizer may measure or tear down engines to confirm conformance to the rules.

final_answer: The organizer may measure or tear down engines to confirm conformance to the rules.
